REPRESENTATIVE DUTIES:
● Assist in the instruction of individual or groups of students; reinforce instruction as directed by the teacher; communicate with students in English and in a designated second language to facilitate the learning process.
● Assist in the administration and scoring of tests and pupil work; assemble student lesson packets; prepare, copy and distribute classroom materials and visual aids.
● Monitor and control student behavior in the classroom and assure health and safety regulations are observed.
● Assist in determining English proficiency of identified students as directed.
● Assist in recording grades and taking roll; distribute and account for textbooks, equipment and other instructional materials.
● Observe reading abilities as assigned; assist students with letter and word pronunciation and recognition; assist students with writing exercises and assignments.
● Provide oral and written translation in parent-teacher conferences or telephone calls with limited or non-English speaking parents; translate notes, letters and other materials as needed.
● Set up and operate audio-visual equipment; operate a variety of classroom and office equipment including a calculator, laminator, copier, paper cutter and computer.
● Maintain a learning environment in a safe, orderly and clean manner; assist in preparing exhibits, displays and bulletin boards.
● Perform assigned clerical duties in support of classroom activities such as answering phones and maintaining records, logs, student folders and files as required.
● Assure the health and safety of students by following established health and safety practices and regulations.
● Monitor and log student attendance and report behavior to teachers as assigned.
● Research, collect, assemble, catalog and distribute resource materials as assigned. ● Promotes a positive and professional environment through respectful communication and cooperation with others.
● Perform related duties as assigned.

South Lake Brewing Company is looking to hire a Line Cook to help operate our small kitchen and
prepare food for customers at our brewpub, the Libation Lodge, located in the Tahoe Village Center.
The primary responsibility of this position is to prepare and cook food and meals for our customers at
the Libation Lodge under the direction of the head chef and/or Lead Line Cooks. Our kitchen is roughly
300 square feet in size and the food menu consists of elevated pub fare. We serve large portion
shareables/appetizers, hot sandwiches and burgers, a mixture of healthy and fried sides, and desserts.
The persons applying for this position must have at least 6 months of experience cooking professionally
in a commercial kitchen as a line cook, restaurant cook, or prep cook. Formal culinary education is a plus
but not required. The ideal candidate is organized, reliable, and passionate about delivering exceptional
food experiences to our guests. Persons applying for this position must be able to speak, read, and write
in the English language. If offered a position, applicants must show proof of current Food Handler’s
Certificate in California or obtain one within 2 weeks of employment at SLBC.
